description_long: This is a classic outdoor drinking fountain constructed primarily from concrete, featuring a large circular basin elevated on a sturdy pedestal. At the center of the basin rises a rectangular column with a decorative top, which houses the water spout and a plaque or sign on one face. The fountain is set within a circular concrete border embedded in the ground, demarcating a small area of worn earth and grass around its base. The spout appears to be integrated into the column, with a small opening for water to flow into the basin below. The structure is robust and utilitarian, designed for public use in parks or urban green spaces, and shows signs of weathering consistent with outdoor installation.
description: A robust concrete outdoor drinking fountain with a raised circular basin, central column, and integrated water spout, set within a circular ground border.
description_view_0: Front view showing the basin, central column with a plaque, and the main spout facing forward.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the circular basin and the side of the central column, with the plaque partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the plaque on the column fully visible, showing the back of the basin and the circular ground border.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the column's profile and the basin's curvature, with the spout and plaque not visible.
attribute_spout_type: integrated straight outlet set into the front face of the central column
attribute_mounting_location: floor-standing, embedded in ground within a circular concrete border
attribute_signage_or_labeling: rectangular plaque with text mounted on the front face of the central column
attribute_surrounding_infrastructure: circular concrete border demarcating a worn earth and grass area
